caption: A man with a beard, wearing a navy blue shirt, is seen in a small inset window on the right side of the screen, seated in a room with equipment and shelving behind him. The main focus of the video is a close-up of a framed sports collectible. The piece features a signature and a description that reads, "A 'RIVERBOAT' WORLD SERIES OPENED IN THE TWIN CITIES, WHERE THE MINNESOTA TV BLASTED THE ST. LOUIS CARDINALS 11-0 IN GAME 1. DAN GLADDEN'S GRAND SLAM." Below this text, it identifies the subject as "KIRBY PUCKETT MINNESOTA TWINS" and states "ONE — OF — ONE TOPPS CERTIFIED CUT SIGNATURE." The item is dated "OCTOBER 17, 1987." A logo for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" is visible in the upper right and middle right of the screen. Across the frames, the camera angle remains static, and the man in the inset continues to look toward the collectible.
